title: AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES - 211info
text: AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on autism resources, respite evenings for caregivers (“Take a Break on ASO”), and autism-friendly community events. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 240 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Office: Friday 11am-2pm or by appointment Email (503) 636-1676 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 636-1676 Toll-free (888) 288-4761 1-888-AUTISM-1 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information. Call ahead before dropping in to weekly office hours or to schedule an appointment FEES: None, donations welcome DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Out of Home Respite Care * Autism Spectrum Disorder Children's Out of Home Respite Care * Autism Spectrum Disorder General Health Education Programs * Autism Spectrum Disorder Specialized Information and Referral * Autism Spectrum Disorder Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - EVENT CALENDAR MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON
